name: Eurocom
description: British developer known for licensed console games, including Disney's The Jungle Book, James Bond titles, Mortal Kombat ports, and other 1990s/2000s console work.

eras.title: Licensed Console Era
eras.description: Eurocom becomes a regular licensed-game and console-port developer across 8-bit, 16-bit, and early 3D systems.

eras.title: Bond and HD Era
eras.description: The studio works on higher-profile licensed console games, especially James Bond titles, before closure.
